{"id":1425924014,"question_id":724,"lang":"cpp","lang_name":"C++","time":"5 days, 23 hours","timestamp":1729213329,"status":10,"status_display":"Accepted","runtime":"0 ms","url":"/submissions/detail/1425924014/","is_pending":"Not Pending","title":"Find Pivot Index","memory":"34.6 MB","code":"class Solution {\npublic:\n    int pivotIndex(vector<int>& nums) {\n        int total_sum = 0;\n        int left_sum = 0;\n        for(int i=0;i<nums.size();i++) {\n            total_sum += nums[i];\n        }\n        for(int i=0;i<nums.size();i++) {\n            if(left_sum == (total_sum - left_sum - nums[i])) {\n                return i;\n            }\n            left_sum += nums[i];\n        }\n        return -1;\n    }\n};","compare_result":"","title_slug":"find-pivot-index","has_notes":false,"flag_type":1}
